comment:
$$\frac{1}{2^x-1}+\frac{4^x\cdot 4^\frac{1}{2}-2^x\cdot 2^5+4}{2^x-16}\geq 2^x\cdot 2\\ \frac{1}{2^x-1}+\frac{2\cdot 4^x-32\cdot 2^x+4}{2^x-16}-2\cdot 2^x\geq 0\\ 2^x=t,t>0\\ \frac{1}{t-1}+\frac{2t^2-32t+4}{t-16}-2t\geq 0\\ \frac{1}{t-1}+2t+\frac{4}{t-16}-2t\geq 0\\ \frac{1}{t-1}+\frac{4}{t-16}\geq 0\\ \frac{t-16+4t-4}{(t-1)(t-16)}\geq 0\\ \frac{5(t-4)}{(t-1)(t-16)}\geq 0$$
$$\displaystyle \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \begin{cases} t >1\\ t\leq 4 \end{cases}\\ \ t >16 \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \begin{cases} 2^{x} >1\\ 2^{x} \leq 2^{2} \end{cases}\\ \ \ 2^{x} >2^{4} \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \begin{cases} x >0\\ x\leq 2 \end{cases}\\ \ \ x >4 \end{array} \right.$$
$$x\in (0;2]\cup (4;+\infty)$$
Ответ: \(x\in ( 0;2] \cup ( 4;+\infty )\).
